scripts.dev:frontend: bash -lc 'PID=$(lsof -t -i:4200 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then echo "Killing process $PID on port 4200"; kill -9 $PID 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; fi; echo "Waiting for backend on port 4352..."; for i in $(seq 1 30); do if curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4352/docs > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Backend is ready!"; break; fi; sleep 1; done; if ! curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4352/docs > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Backend failed to start within 30 seconds"; exit 1; fi; cd client && API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4352 bash scripts/generate.sh && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run start'
scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'PID=$(lsof -t -i:4352 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then echo "Killing process $PID on port 4352"; kill -9 $PID 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; fi; cd backend && uv run fastapi dev app/main.py --port 4352'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.format: cd backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.docs:dev:with-frontend: bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; npm run docs:dev & cd frontend && npm run start'
scripts.frontend:verify: cd frontend && bash scripts/write-environment.sh && npm run build
